description: Jacob and Joe discuss the latest changes in Solana, focusing on SIMD16 application fees for writable accounts and the upcoming Sandstorm hackathon from January 10th to 23rd.
topic_summary: The episode covers SIMD16's introduction of application fees for writable accounts [t=21:24], the implications for DApps [t=33:49], and the Sandstorm hackathon organized by Helios Labs and Lamport Dao [t=213:27].
